pageDescription: Keep your software and drivers up to date

tabs.softwareDescriptionWindows: Third-party apps via winget, Chocolatey, Scoop & npm

softwareUpdater.pageDescription: Check for outdated software and install updates
softwareUpdater.managerEnabledHint: {{manager}} enabled — click to stop scanning it

packageManagerNotFound.brewRequired: Homebrew is required. Install it from
packageManagerNotFound.wingetRequired: Windows Package Manager is required. Install it from the
packageManagerNotFound.chocoRequired: Chocolatey is required. Install it from
packageManagerNotFound.aptRequired: APT package manager is required. It should be pre-installed on Debian and Ubuntu systems.
packageManagerNotFound.dnfRequired: DNF package manager is required. It should be pre-installed on Fedora and RHEL systems.
packageManagerNotFound.pacmanRequired: Pacman package manager is required. It should be pre-installed on Arch Linux systems.
packageManagerNotFound.noPackageManager: No supported package manager found. Supported: apt (Debian/Ubuntu), dnf (Fedora/RHEL), or pacman (Arch).
packageManagerNotFound.windowsManagerHint: Install winget (App Installer), Chocolatey, Scoop, or npm to check for and install software updates.

softwareUpdater.emptyStateDescription: Scan your installed software to find available updates.
softwareUpdater.checkingSubtext: This may take a moment while your package manager queries available updates
softwareUpdater.allUpToDateDescription: All your installed software is running the latest version. Check back later for new updates.
softwareUpdater.toastAllUpToDate: All software is up to date!

driverManager.pageDescription: Scan for outdated drivers, install updates, and clean stale packages — all in one step
driverManager.safeOperationText: Installs newer driver versions from Windows Update and removes old driver packages. Active drivers are never touched.
driverManager.queryingWindowsUpdate: Querying Windows Update for driver updates...
driverManager.rebootRequired: A system restart is required to complete the installation.
driverManager.emptyStateDescription: Scan to find available updates and stale driver packages to clean up.
driverManager.allUpToDateTitle: All drivers are up to date
driverManager.allUpToDateDescription: No updates available and no stale packages found.
driverManager.updatesDisabledTitle: Driver updates are turned off in Windows
driverManager.updatesDisabledText: Windows is set to exclude drivers from Windows Update, so LightClean did not check for driver updates. Stale driver package cleanup still works. You can re-enable driver updates in Windows device installation settings or Group Policy.
driverManager.confirmDescriptionRebootNote: A system restart may be required after installing updates.
driverManager.confirmDescriptionSuffix: Currently active drivers will not be affected.
driverManager.scanFailedDescription: Make sure the app is running as Administrator
driverManager.scanFailedError: Failed to scan driver packages. Make sure the app is running as Administrator.
driverManager.updateScanFailedDescription: Make sure Windows Update service is running
driverManager.updateScanFailedError: Failed to check for driver updates. Make sure Windows Update service is running.
driverManager.installFailedError: Failed to install driver updates. Administrator privileges are required.
driverManager.cleanFailedError: Failed to remove driver packages. Administrator privileges are required.
